name: AI Cyber Shield
motive: Defensive system guard that watches processes/network/system health, explains threats, reports evidence, and fixes safely with approval.
priority_reason: Protects the whole ecosystem and local AI machine.
next_build: Add process/network monitor, CCNA-style port/protocol checks, health dashboard, evidence reports, local drill/eval harness, and approval-gated response actions.
integration_role: Protects Kattappa AI OS, plugins, microphone/audio permissions, project tools, local web servers, and automation adapters.
safety_boundary: Defensive only; no retaliation or exact-hacker-location claims beyond evidence/IP attribution limits.
